title: Replace phone number in header with +91 9700104108

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/components/Header.tsx`, locate the `<strong>` element inside the top bar's phone/contact span (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/span[1]/strong[1]) and replace its text content with '+91 9700104108'.
acceptanceCriteria: The header top bar displays '+91 9700104108' as the phone number.
No other header content or styling is changed.
The change is visible on all pages that use the shared Header component.

constraints: Only modify the single <strong> element identified by the given XPath in Header.tsx.
Do not alter any other text, layout, or styling in the Header component.
nonGoals: Updating phone numbers in the Footer or any other component.
Changing the header layout or styling.
